TooFar: There is a lit candle nearby, but I can't reach it. Will have to move closer.
TooFarIncense: There is a lit incense nearby, but I can't reach it. Will have to move closer.
DebugWarning: Please note you have debug mode turned on. It isn't recommended to leave this on unless you have a purpose for it.
cfg.debug_logging.name: Debug Logging
cfg.debug_logging.desc: Write detailed diagnostic info to the BepInEx log while you play.
cfg.extinguish_distance.name: Extinguish Distance
cfg.extinguish_distance.desc: How close you need to stand to a lit candle before the extinguish key picks it up. Snaps to quarter-unit increments.
cfg.directional_arrow.name: Directional Arrow
cfg.directional_arrow.desc: On: when a lit candle is nearby but out of reach, a pointer arrow appears above it. Off: no arrow, you'll only see a speech bubble when you're too far.
cfg.church_columns.name: Church Columns
cfg.church_columns.desc: On: the stone columns running down the middle of the church are visible as normal. Off: the columns are hidden for an unobstructed view of the altar and candles.
cfg.extinguish_candle_keybind.name: Extinguish Candle Keybind
cfg.extinguish_candle_keybind.desc: Keyboard key you press to extinguish the nearest lit candle when you're in range.
Controller button you press to extinguish the nearest lit candle when you're in range.
cfg.extinguish_incense_keybind.name: Extinguish Incense Keybind
cfg.extinguish_incense_keybind.desc: Keyboard key for extinguishing the nearest lit incense. Unbound by default; set a key if you want to extinguish incenses too.
cfg.extinguish_incense_controller_button: Controller button for extinguishing the nearest lit incense. Unbound by default.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
